'''Krutch''' was an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] in [[the Cauldron]] arena on the planet [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. It wielded several blades and a net against the other combatants, but during one battle it was defeated by [[Kulltu Kutta]].

==Biography==
Shortly after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the insectoid combatant who went by the name of Krutch<ref name="Sticker" /> fought in [[the Cauldron]] on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]].<ref name="CW" /> It was the largest gladiatorial pit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], filled with violent warriors, where war barons and generals sought out the best combatants who would win their wars.<ref name="DBR">{{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}}</ref> Therefore, Krutch, like many other gladiators,<ref name="CW" /> entered a deadly free-for-all battle,<ref name="EGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> but it was a rare gladiator indeed who could survive multiple fights there.<ref name="DBR" />

[[File:Krutch_Crockagor.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Krutch faces Crockagor in the Cauldron.]]
During one battle, Krutch engaged in a duel with the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Crockagor]]. The latter attempted to strike Krutch with a mace, but it blocked the blow with its shield, cast a net over his opponent, and swiftly finished him off. Shortly afterward, another gladiator,<ref name="CW" /> [[Kulltu Kutta]],<ref name="Sticker" /> rode up to Krutch on [[Sowsquatch|own beast]] and cleaved it in two, causing the insectoid to explode.<ref name="CW" />

==Personality and traits==
It scuttled into battle on multiple legs, carrying a net, a mace, and several blades in its six arms.<ref name="Sticker" />

==Behind the scenes==
Krutch<ref name="Sticker" /> first appeared as an unnamed background character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The character was later given a name in ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', a sticker book written by [[Simon Beecroft]] and released in [[2004]].<ref name="DK">{{DK|url=us/9780756607593-ultimate-sticker-book-star-wars-clone-wars|text=Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars|nolive=1}}</ref>

A noticeable mistake in the episode is that Krutch is seemingly killed twice: first by Kulltu Kutta, and later by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] when she pulls chunks of rock from the ceiling to crush several gladiators.<ref name="CW" />
